case_title: PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. VS. KEVIN P MCCLAIN et al

docket_entries.description: POS BY MAIL OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT AND DECL. OF DAVID C SCOTT FOR CONTINUANCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-18-2006 CONTINUED TO OCT-20-2006 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCLAIN, KEVIN P $7,209.39 PRINCIPAL, $227.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,436.39, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-20-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE OCT-20-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15 INCLUSIVE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C. SERVED MAY-13-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLAIN, KEVIN P
